description_long: This is a vibrant slice of rainbow cake, featuring multiple horizontal layers in vivid colors: red, orange, yellow, green, blue, and purple. The top of the cake is generously covered with a thick, uneven layer of white icing that drapes slightly over the edges, giving it a homemade and inviting appearance. The sides of the cake clearly display the colorful layers, each separated by thin lines of white filling, suggesting a moist and fluffy texture. The back of the slice is fully coated in white icing, with no visible colored layers. There are no visible decorations or embellishments beyond the icing and colored layers. The cake is not presented on any plate or tray, and no candles or additional adornments are present.
description: A slice of rainbow layer cake with thick white icing on top and vibrant colored layers visible on the sides. The cake looks soft, moist, and inviting, with a homemade finish.
description_view_0: The front view shows the triangular face of the cake slice, highlighting the white icing on top and the colorful rainbow layers on the side.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the horizontal rainbow layers and the thick, uneven white icing on top.
description_view_2: The back view is mostly covered in white icing, with no colored layers visible, giving a plain appearance.
description_view_3: This angled side view again showcases the rainbow layers and the thick white icing, similar to view 1 but from the opposite side.
